component.name: Mizer
component.summary: A visualization software for live events like concerts and club gigs with a node based workflow

description.p: A visualization software for live events like concerts and club gigs with a node based workflow. Use a classic programmer workflow or a modern node workflow to control every device you can imagine. Use it as an adapter layer between multiple applications, remote control for a lighting desk, to control your led pixel fixtures from a lighting desk with limited universes or anything else you can imagine. It can communicate using Artnet, sACN, OSC, MIDI, MQTT, NDI with other devices and applications.
